arts.ttl: “In January, we will decide…” – Chelsea star’s reps actively exploring transfer following Maresca comments
arts.sum: The representatives of Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku are reportedly actively looking for a solution for the player in the upcoming January transfer window. The France international has struggled for playing time at Stamford Bridge, and it’s not clear he really fits into Enzo Maresca’s plans at the moment. Although Nkunku is a fine player, he […] The post “In January, we will decide…” – Chelsea star’s reps actively exploring transfer following Maresca comments appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk spotted at Oleksandr Usyk vs Tyson Fury 2 after drugs test controversy
arts.sum: Days after being suspended for failing a drugs test, Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk has been seen sitting ringside at Tyson Fury's rematch with fellow Ukrainian Oleksandr Usyk. Ukrainian boxing heavyweight champion of the world Usyk is going up against Manchester's Fury for the second time this calendar year.

arts.ttl: Everton new stadium will create a stronger Liverpool - not just a better football club

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca offers final Chelsea transfer lifeline as genius contract clause explained
arts.sum: Harvey Vale has been handed a lifeline by Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca in the past eight days. While Maresca has certainly handed Vale a lifeline in recent matches, his future at the club remains uncertain.
